requirement_topic.en: Pressure Equipment Directive — Refrigerant Circuit Classification (via EEA)
requirement_topic.zh: 压力设备指令——制冷剂回路分类（通过欧洲经济区适用）
requirement_topic.zht: 壓力設備指令——制冷劑迴路分類（通過歐洲經濟區適用）

summary.en: Pressure Equipment Directive 2014/68/EU (PED) applies in Norway via the EEA Agreement. Heat pump refrigerant circuits are classified as pressure equipment. Classification depends on fluid group (Group 1 = flammable or toxic refrigerants such as R290; Group 2 = non-flammable, non-toxic refrigerants such as R32 and R410A), maximum allowable pressure, and volume. Category I (lowest risk) allows manufacturer self-declaration; Categories II, III, and IV require involvement of a Notified Body. EN 378 also applies for system-level refrigerating system safety. DSB is the Norwegian market surveillance authority for pressure equipment placed on the market.
summary.zh: 压力设备指令2014/68/EU（PED）通过欧洲经济区协议在挪威适用。热泵制冷剂回路被视为压力设备。分类取决于流体组别（第1组=可燃或有毒制冷剂，如R290；第2组=不可燃、无毒制冷剂，如R32和R410A）、最高许用压力及容积。第I类（最低风险）允许制造商自我声明；第II类、第III类和第IV类须引入公告机构。EN 378同样适用于系统级制冷系统安全。DSB是负责投放市场的压力设备的挪威市场监督机构。
summary.zht: 壓力設備指令2014/68/EU（PED）通過歐洲經濟區協議在挪威適用。熱泵制冷劑迴路被視為壓力設備。分類取決於流體組別（第1組=可燃或有毒制冷劑，如R290；第2組=不可燃、無毒制冷劑，如R32和R410A）、最高許用壓力及容積。第I類（最低風險）允許製造商自我聲明；第II類、第III類和第IV類須引入公告機構。EN 378同樣適用於系統級制冷系統安全。DSB是負責投放市場的壓力設備的挪威市場監督機構。

summary.en: TSG 21-2016 (Special Equipment Safety Technical Supervision Regulations for Boilers and Pressure Vessels, administered by SAMR) and GB 150.1-150.4-2011 (Pressure vessels) govern pressure vessels in China. SELO (Special Equipment Licensing Office) registration is required for certain pressure vessels. The Chinese risk classification methodology differs from PED: different boundary conditions, different inspection body roles, and SELO registration is not a CE marking equivalent.
summary.zh: TSG 21-2016（由市监总局管理的锅炉和压力容器安全技术监察规程）和GB 150.1-150.4-2011（压力容器）管辖中国境内的压力容器。特定压力容器须向特种设备许可机构（SELO）进行注册。中国风险分类方法与PED不同：边界条件不同、检验机构职能不同，SELO注册并非CE标志的等效证明。
summary.zht: TSG 21-2016（由市監總局管理的鍋爐和壓力容器安全技術監察規程）和GB 150.1-150.4-2011（壓力容器）管轄中國境內的壓力容器。特定壓力容器須向特種設備許可機構（SELO）進行登記。中國風險分類方法與PED不同：邊界條件不同、檢驗機構職能不同，SELO登記並非CE標誌的等效證明。

gap.en: PED classification and Notified Body requirements, as applied in Norway via EEA, differ substantially from the Chinese SELO/TSG system. Chinese pressure vessel approvals (TSG/SELO certificates) are not recognised under PED. For heat pump circuits classified as PED Category II or higher, a Notified Body must be engaged. Refrigerant circuit re-design or re-certification to PED categories may be required before Norwegian market entry.
gap.zh: 通过欧洲经济区在挪威适用的PED分类和公告机构要求与中国SELO/TSG体系存在实质性差异。在中国取得的压力容器批准（TSG/SELO证书）在PED下不被认可。对于被分类为PED第II类或更高类别的热泵回路，须引入公告机构。制冷剂回路可能需要在进入挪威市场前按PED类别重新设计或重新取证。
gap.zht: 通過歐洲經濟區在挪威適用的PED分類和公告機構要求與中國SELO/TSG體系存在實質性差異。在中國取得的壓力容器批准（TSG/SELO證書）在PED下不被認可。對於被分類為PED第II類或更高類別的熱泵迴路，須引入公告機構。制冷劑迴路可能需要在進入挪威市場前按PED類別重新設計或重新取證。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory (PED applies via EEA to refrigerant circuits meeting pressure/volume thresholds; DSB market surveillance)
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory (TSG 21/SELO registration for applicable pressure vessels)

source.publisher: DSB — Direktoratet for samfunnssikkerhet og beredskap

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Major gap — PED classification and Notified Body requirements (applicable in Norway via EEA) differ substantially from Chinese SELO/TSG system; existing Chinese pressure vessel approvals not recognised under PED.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 重大差距——PED分类和公告机构要求（通过欧洲经济区在挪威适用）与中国SELO/TSG体系存在实质性差异；现有中国压力容器批准在PED下不被认可。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 重大差距——PED分類和公告機構要求（通過歐洲經濟區在挪威適用）與中國SELO/TSG體系存在實質性差異；現有中國壓力容器批准在PED下不被認可。

requirement_topic.en: Refrigerant Circuit Safety — EN 378 System Safety Requirements for Norwegian Market
requirement_topic.zh: 制冷剂回路安全——挪威市场EN 378系统安全要求
requirement_topic.zht: 制冷劑迴路安全——挪威市場EN 378系統安全要求

summary.en: Pressure Equipment Directive 2014/68/EU is the mandatory legal framework for refrigerant circuits meeting its pressure, volume, and fluid-group thresholds, applicable in Norway via EEA. EN 378-1:2016+A1:2020, EN 378-2:2016+A1:2019, EN 378-3:2016, and EN 378-4:2016 are voluntary harmonised standards for refrigerating systems and heat pumps that may support a presumption of conformity. Given Norway's cold climate, EN 14825 testing at outdoor temperatures of -7°C and -15°C is also critical for system safety validation in realistic operating conditions.
summary.zh: 压力设备指令2014/68/EU是适用于达到其压力、容积和流体组别阈值的制冷剂回路的强制性法律框架，通过欧洲经济区在挪威适用。EN 378-1:2016+A1:2020、EN 378-2:2016+A1:2019、EN 378-3:2016和EN 378-4:2016是可支持符合性推定的自愿协调标准。鉴于挪威的寒冷气候，EN 14825在-7°C和-15°C室外温度下的测试对于在实际运行条件下验证系统安全性同样至关重要。
summary.zht: 壓力設備指令2014/68/EU是適用於達到其壓力、容積和流體組別閾值的制冷劑迴路的強制性法律框架，通過歐洲經濟區在挪威適用。EN 378-1:2016+A1:2020、EN 378-2:2016+A1:2019、EN 378-3:2016和EN 378-4:2016是可支持符合性推定的自願協調標準。鑒於挪威的寒冷氣候，EN 14825在-7°C和-15°C室外溫度下的測試對於在實際運行條件下驗證系統安全性同樣至關重要。

summary.en: GB 9237-2008 (Safety requirements for refrigerating systems) is China's national adoption of ISO 5149:1993. The current revision status of GB/T 9237 should be verified at time of compliance assessment. Charge limits for flammable refrigerants in indoor environments, room ventilation thresholds, and system documentation requirements differ from EN 378. China's test climate conditions (typically +7°C outdoor) do not cover Norwegian cold-climate operating scenarios at -7°C or -15°C.
summary.zh: GB 9237-2008（制冷系统安全要求）是中国对ISO 5149:1993的国家采标。GB/T 9237的当前修订状态应在合规评估时予以核查。室内可燃制冷剂充注量限制、房间通风阈值和系统文件要求与EN 378不同。中国测试气候条件（通常为+7°C室外温度）不涵盖挪威在-7°C或-15°C的严寒气候运行场景。
summary.zht: GB 9237-2008（制冷系統安全要求）是中國對ISO 5149:1993的國家採標。GB/T 9237的當前修訂狀態應在合規評估時予以核查。室內可燃制冷劑充注量限制、房間通風閾值和系統文件要求與EN 378不同。中國測試氣候條件（通常為+7°C室外溫度）不涵蓋挪威在-7°C或-15°C的嚴寒氣候運行場景。

gap.en: EU/EEA legal compliance must be assessed against PED where the refrigerant circuit falls within PED scope. EN 378 documentation, leak detection, and flammable refrigerant charge-limit methods differ from GB 9237. Additionally, Chinese standard test conditions do not replicate Norwegian cold-climate operating temperatures (-7°C / -15°C), creating a safety and performance gap that EN 14825 cold-climate testing must address.
gap.zh: 若制冷剂回路落入PED范围，欧盟/欧洲经济区法律合规性必须按PED评估。EN 378的文件、泄漏检测和可燃制冷剂充注量限制方法与GB 9237不同。此外，中国标准测试条件不能复制挪威严寒气候的运行温度（-7°C/-15°C），EN 14825严寒气候测试须弥补这一安全和性能差距。
gap.zht: 若制冷劑迴路落入PED範圍，歐盟/歐洲經濟區法律合規性必須按PED評估。EN 378的文件、洩漏檢測和可燃制冷劑充注量限制方法與GB 9237不同。此外，中國標準測試條件不能複製挪威嚴寒氣候的運行溫度（-7°C/-15°C），EN 14825嚴寒氣候測試須彌補這一安全和性能差距。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory legal obligation: PED applies via EEA where pressure/volume/fluid-group thresholds are met; EN 378 and EN 14825 cold-climate testing voluntary but critical for Norway
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory (GB 9237 under fire safety and product safety regime)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Gap — PED applicability must be classified first; EN 378 is a voluntary harmonised route for presumption of conformity; cold-climate performance and safety at -7°C / -15°C must be validated for Norway; GB 9237 methods differ from EN 378.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 存在差距——须先判定PED适用性；EN 378是取得符合性推定的自愿协调标准路径；挪威市场须验证-7°C/-15°C严寒气候下的性能和安全性；GB 9237方法与EN 378不同。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 存在差距——須先判定PED適用性；EN 378是取得符合性推定的自願協調標準路徑；挪威市場須驗證-7°C/-15°C嚴寒氣候下的性能和安全性；GB 9237方法與EN 378不同。
